case_title: MAGINNISS DANIEL DBA ALEXIS JEWELERS VS MALDONADO MIGUEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,592.73 FILED BY MAGINNISS DANIEL DBA ALEXIS JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT MALDONADO MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

BY 7-20-91 THEN AMT.OWED IS $892.73 OR JUDG.STANDS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
